solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Latency delivery next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-08
openclaw message send --channel telegram --target @alice --message 'Latency update posted and being tracked.'
email send --to support@example.com --subject 'Latency delivery recap' --body 'The delivery path is recovered and the update is posted.'
